title: Craftiamon
description: Addon for Cobblemon with the idea of adding vanilla creatures as cobblemons
body:
![COBBLEMON CRAFTIA](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/445ebee38b41004d2c59ff50685ae7b9d4f9d8e4.png)

Craftiamons is a datapack that turns vanilla mobs into pokemon, some with unique twists on how to find, evolve or in combat!

Each mob has a certain role in mind, so don't be surprised if some are a bit wonky to use or go against, i'm not exactly the best at pokemon balance, but learning each day



# Important!

**HIGHLY RECOMMENDED TO USE OTHER VANILLA POKEMON ADDITIONS ALONGSIDE IT, ASWELL AS DISABLE MOST MOBS (NON NECESSARY) FROM SPAWNING**

Any bugs or related issues, you can ask me in the official cobblemon discord 
PLEASE DO NOT SEND BUG REPORTS TO THE COBBLEMON TEAM, IF THERE'S ANY ISSUE REPORT TO ME ONLY!
